intro EQs. apply add_pairwise_equals with (s := trms_map (relation_arity_table L R) ts ts') (p := Imp_frm (Rel_frm R (fst (varcouples (relation_arity_table L R)))) (Rel_frm R (snd (varcouples (relation_arity_table L R))))).
- exact EQs.
- exact (fun z Hz => eq_refl).
- apply extend_proves with (Gamma := E.empty).

apply (add_pairwise_equals n ts ts' (trms_map n ts ts') Gamma (Imp_frm (Rel_frm R (fst (varcouples n))) (Rel_frm R (snd (varcouples n)))) H).
- intros z Hz; reflexivity.
- simpl; auto.

intros Gamma R ts ts' H. induction (relation_arity_table L R) as [| n IH]; intros ts ts' H.
- destruct ts, ts'; apply proves_imp_refl.
- destruct H as [Hhead Htail]. apply proves_Rel_cong with (t := head ts) (ts := tail ts) (t' := head ts') (ts' := tail ts');
      [exact Hhead | apply IH; exact Htail].
intros H. apply pairwise_equal_implies. exact H.
